product_overview: Manapro is a web-based project management app localized for Indonesian UMKM that enables teams to create workspaces, projects and tasks (Kanban + table), collaborate with comments and mentions, and manage tenants and basic billing. It includes a guided onboarding to create the first business and supports team membership administration.
core_goals: Let small businesses create and manage workspaces, projects and tasks using Kanban and table views
Enable team collaboration through comments, @mentions and activity feeds
Make multi-tenant workflows simple: create/select tenant, manage workspaces and invite members
Provide quick self-service onboarding so new users can create a business and start working immediately
Allow users to view subscription status, usage limits and invoices from the app

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register, sign in, and request password resets with email/password so they can access their tenant and workspaces.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See redirect to /onboarding
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See redirect to workspace list
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill in email -> Submit password reset request -> See confirmation message
Navigate to /register -> Fill in invalid email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See email validation error

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Guide new users to create their first business/tenant and choose a plan so they can start creating workspaces and projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Fill business name -> Select subscription plan (Free/Pro/Enterprise) -> Submit create business -> See redirect to workspace list
Navigate to /onboarding -> Skip plan selection -> Submit create business -> See redirect to workspace list

features.name: Tenant & Workspace Selection
features.description: Let users choose which tenant/business to work in and view that tenant's list of workspaces so they can manage multiple businesses or switch context.
user_flows: Navigate to /select-tenant -> Select tenant from list -> See list of workspaces for selected tenant
Navigate to /select-tenant -> Select tenant -> Toggle workspace view between Card and Table -> Open workspace to view its projects

features.name: Workspace Management
features.description: Create and organize workspaces inside a tenant so teams can group related projects.
user_flows: Open tenant workspace list -> View list of workspaces in card or table format -> Switch to Card view -> Start create new workspace -> Fill workspace name -> Submit create -> See new workspace appear in list -> Open workspace to view projects
Open tenant workspace list -> Start create new workspace -> Submit with empty name -> See validation error for workspace name

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create and manage projects (from blank or from templates) so teams can organize work inside workspaces.
user_flows: Open a workspace -> View list of projects in card or table format -> Choose create new project -> Fill project name -> Fill project description -> Submit create -> See project in list -> Open project to access board

Open a workspace -> Choose create new project -> Select create from template option -> Select template category -> Select template -> Confirm use template -> See project created with predefined columns

features.name: Kanban Board Task Management
features.description: Create, view and move tasks on a Kanban board or table, open task details, comment and track activity.
user_flows: Open a project board -> View tasks organized in Kanban columns -> Switch to Table view -> Open new task form -> Fill task title -> Fill task description -> Set priority -> Set due date -> Assign a user -> Submit task -> See task appear in the target column

Open a project board -> Drag task card from one column to another -> See task positioned in the destination column -> Open task detail panel -> Add a comment with an @mention -> See comment appear in activity feed
Open a project board -> Open new task form -> Leave title empty -> Submit task form -> See validation error for required title

features.name: Team Members Management
features.description: Invite, view and manage team members and their roles within a tenant so owners can control access and collaboration.
user_flows: Open Members management -> View list of team members -> Start invite member flow -> Fill invitee email -> Select role -> Send invite -> See pending invite in members list
Open Members management -> Select existing member -> Change member role -> Confirm role change -> See updated role in members list
Open Members management -> Select existing member -> Remove member from tenant -> Confirm removal -> See member removed from list

features.name: Settings & Profile
features.description: Let users update personal profile and tenant business settings such as avatar, contact info, language and business logo.
user_flows: Open Settings -> View current profile information -> Upload new avatar photo -> Fill name -> Fill phone -> Fill division -> Fill position -> Save profile -> See updated profile details
Open Settings -> Open language selector -> Choose ID or EN -> See language preference updated
Open Settings -> Open Business tab -> Upload business logo -> Save business settings -> See updated business branding

features.name: Billing & Subscription (view & basic management)
features.description: Allow tenants to view their current plan, usage limits and invoice history and choose billing preferences.
user_flows: Open Billing -> View current plan and status -> View usage limits for members and projects -> View invoice history
Open Billing -> Select billing cycle (monthly or yearly) -> Confirm selection -> See billing cycle updated in UI
Open Billing -> Select pending invoice -> Initiate payment flow -> Confirm payment initiation -> See invoice marked as paid

routes.description: New user onboarding to create business
Select business for users with multiple tenants
Kanban board and table view for tasks

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Fill email input field with budi@manapro.id
Fill password input field with password123
Click Masuk button to login
See redirect to workspace after successful login

features.name: Workspace Management
features.description: Create and manage workspaces within a tenant
user_interactions: View list of workspaces in card or table format
Click Workspace Baru button to create new workspace
Fill workspace name in modal
Click Buat button to submit
Click on workspace card to open projects
Toggle between Card and Tabel view

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create and manage projects, including templates
user_interactions: View list of projects in card or table format
Click Proyek Baru button to create new project
Fill project name and description
Click Dari Template button to create from template
Select template category and template
Click Use Template to create project with predefined columns
Click on project to open Kanban board

features.name: Kanban Board Task Management
features.description: Manage tasks with drag-and-drop Kanban board
user_interactions: View tasks in Kanban board with columns
Toggle between Board and Tabel view
Click Tambah Tugas to create new task
Fill task title, description, priority, due date, assignee
Drag task card to move between columns
Click task card to open detail panel
Add comments with @mentions
View activity feed sidebar

features.name: Team Members Management
features.description: Invite and manage team members with roles
user_interactions: View list of team members
Click Undang Anggota button to invite
Fill email and select role
Click Undang button to send invite
Click menu on member to change role or remove

features.name: Billing and Subscription
user_interactions: View current plan and status
View usage limits (members, projects)
Click Upgrade button to change plan
Select billing cycle (monthly/yearly)
View invoice history
Click Bayar to pay pending invoice

features.name: Settings and Profile
features.description: Update user profile and business settings
user_interactions: View profile with avatar and info
Click avatar to upload new photo
Fill name, phone, division, position fields
Click Simpan to save profile
Click ID or EN to change language
Click Bisnis tab to manage business settings
Upload business logo

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: New user onboarding to create first business
user_interactions: Fill business name
Select subscription plan (Free/Pro/Enterprise)
Click Buat Bisnis button
Redirect to workspace after creation

known_limitations.issue: Backend API must be running for full functionality
known_limitations.impact: Set VITE_USE_MOCK=true to use mock data without backend
